title: 한국대학교육협의회_대학알리미 재정 현황

application.portal_completion_message: 신청이 완료되었습니다. 신청된 API는 1~2시간 후 호출 가능합니다. 일부 API에서 24시간 후 인증이 가능한 API가 있습니다.
application.purpose_entered: UMMAYA R&D. Citizen university finance looku adater for tuition, scholarshis, student loans, and education-investment questions using official AcademyInfo data. No resale.

ummaya.fit: Citizen-facing university finance lookup for tuition, scholarships, per-student education investment, student-loan status, and student-loan usage-ratio questions.
ummaya.expected_usage: Moderate overall; high during admissions, scholarship, transfer, enrollment-payment, and education-policy analysis seasons.

natural_language_mappings.handling: Resolve the university name to schlId with AcademyInfo code lookup, call getComparisonTuitionCrntSt with svyYr and schlId, then summarize official indicator values.
Resolve the university name, call the scholarship benefit operation documented in the guide, then return official scholarship benefit fields with source citation.

natural_language_mappings.query: 이 대학 학자금 대출 이용 비율 확인해줘.
natural_language_mappings.handling: Call the student-loan usage-ratio operation and explain the official ratio by year and school.
Use the regional tuition operation family with school-type or region filters, then compare official regional values.

request_parameters.name: ServiceKey
request_parameters.description: Issued service key; portal table uses ServiceKey while guide examples use serviceKey.

caveats: The completion dialog says calls may work after 1-2 hours, with some APIs requiring up to 24 hours.
The application form displayed a generic location-information warning, although this dataset is university finance data.
The DOCX appears to repeat getComparisonTuitionCrntSt in one education-expense comparison example; verify exact expansion operation names with direct curl probes after key activation.
Never save the issued service key in repository files.
